{{CargoClone
|name=Black Dragon
|rank=orange
|cabin=2
|id=191
|gene1={race} RUSH +50
|gene2={race} FTH +50
|gene3=Species War Cabin Output +3%
|gene4=Per 60 Dragon Minions in battle,
Troop Wind DMG +6
|gene5=Dragon Minion Skin RUSH +30%
|gene6=Per 60 Dragon Minions in battle,
Troop Wind DMG +10
|gene7=Dragon Minion Skin RUSH +50%
|}}
